auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Enigma API key sent with the x-api-key header. Create it from the Enigma API getting-started flow: https://developers.enigma.com/docs/getting-started.

actions.name: create_list
actions.description: Create a user-managed Enigma list from a search definition or input file, with optional aliases, column ordering, and column mapping.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for creating a user-managed Enigma list. Provide either searchInput or inputFileUri.

outputSchema.description: The normalized output of the Enigma create_list action.

actions.name: create_suggestion
actions.description: Submit a suggestion to Enigma for data correction or enrichment feedback using the official GraphQL suggestion mutation.

suggestedByEmail.description: The email address of the person submitting the suggestion.

status.description: The suggestion status to set when supported.

suggestedValue.description: The JSON value being proposed for the target field.

ancestorIdentifier.description: Ancestor entities related to the suggestion.

suggestedEntityIdentifier.description: The entity identifier the suggestion is attached to.

field.description: The target field being suggested for update.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for submitting an Enigma suggestion.

outputSchema.description: The normalized output of the Enigma create_suggestion action.

actions.name: delete_list
actions.description: Delete a user-managed Enigma list by ID.

id.description: The Enigma list ID to delete.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for deleting a user-managed Enigma list.

id.description: The Enigma list ID that was deleted.

outputSchema.description: The normalized output of the Enigma delete_list action.

actions.name: get_account
actions.description: Retrieve the current Enigma account metadata available to the connected API key, including customer, billing, and auto-recharge details.

inputSchema.description: This action does not require any input fields.

actions.name: get_aggregate_counts
actions.description: Run the official Enigma GraphQL aggregate query to count matching entities or related entities for a search request.

prompt.description: A natural-language prompt used by Enigma semantic search.

id.description: The Enigma GraphQL entity ID to look up directly.

name.description: The business or entity name to search for.

id.description: The Enigma address identifier to search for directly.

street1.description: The first street-address line used to narrow the search.

street2.description: The second street-address line, such as suite or unit number.

city.description: The city used to narrow the search.

state.description: The state or region used to narrow the search.

postalCode.description: The postal code used to narrow the search.

address.description: An official Enigma GraphQL address input object.

id.description: The Enigma address identifier to search for directly.

street1.description: The first street-address line used to narrow the search.

street2.description: The second street-address line, such as suite or unit number.

city.description: The city used to narrow the search.

state.description: The state or region used to narrow the search.

postalCode.description: The postal code used to narrow the search.

items.description: An official Enigma GraphQL address input object.

addresses.description: Multiple address candidates used to narrow the search.

id.description: The Enigma address identifier to search for directly.

street1.description: The first street-address line used to narrow the search.

street2.description: The second street-address line, such as suite or unit number.

city.description: The city used to narrow the search.

state.description: The state or region used to narrow the search.

postalCode.description: The postal code used to narrow the search.

address.description: An official Enigma GraphQL address input object.

tin.description: The taxpayer identification number to search with.

tinType.description: The TIN type Enigma should use for the search.

tin.description: An official Enigma GraphQL TIN input object.

person.description: An official Enigma GraphQL person input object.

phoneNumber.description: A complete phone number used to narrow the search.

website.description: A website URL or domain used to narrow the search.

orderBy.description: The order-by expressions Enigma should apply.

limit.description: The maximum number of matches to return.

pageToken.description: The opaque Enigma page token used to continue pagination.

conditions.description: The official Enigma GraphQL conditions object.

tin.description: The taxpayer identification number to search with.

tinType.description: The TIN type Enigma should use for the search.

tin.description: An official Enigma GraphQL TIN input object.

matchThreshold.description: The minimum Enigma match confidence to keep.

entityType.description: The Enigma entity type to search or retrieve: brand, operating location, or legal entity.

engine.description: The Enigma search engine override to use for the query.

output.description: The official Enigma GraphQL output specification.

format.description: The export file format Enigma should generate.

enrichmentIdsS3Path.description: The Enigma-supported S3 parquet path containing internal_id values.

countField.description: The Enigma field path or supported alias to count.

orderBy.description: The order-by expressions Enigma should apply.

limit.description: The maximum number of matches to return.

pageToken.description: The opaque Enigma page token used to continue pagination.

countConditions.description: The official Enigma GraphQL conditions object.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for the Enigma GraphQL aggregate count query.

countField.description: The resolved Enigma field path that was counted.

anyOf.description: The aggregate count returned by Enigma.

outputSchema.description: The normalized output of the Enigma get_aggregate_counts action.

actions.name: get_background_task
actions.description: Retrieve the latest status for an Enigma background task created by an asynchronous GraphQL search or export workflow.

id.description: The Enigma background task UUID to retrieve.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving an Enigma background task.

outputSchema.description: The normalized output of the Enigma get_background_task action.

actions.name: get_business
actions.description: Retrieve a single Enigma entity by GraphQL entity ID and entity type, returning the provider entity payload.

id.description: The Enigma GraphQL entity ID to retrieve.

entityType.description: The Enigma entity type to search or retrieve: brand, operating location, or legal entity.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving a single Enigma entity by ID.

business.description: The Enigma entity, or null when nothing matched.

outputSchema.description: The normalized output of the Enigma get_business action.

actions.name: get_graphql_schema_extended
actions.description: Retrieve Enigma's extended GraphQL schema metadata, including types, projections, and data-asset descriptors.

inputSchema.description: This action does not require any input fields.

outputSchema.description: The normalized output of the Enigma get_graphql_schema_extended action.

actions.name: get_list_materialization
actions.description: Retrieve an Enigma list materialization by ID, including progress, generated resource URI, metrics, and billing details.

id.description: The Enigma list materialization ID to retrieve.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving a list materialization.

outputSchema.description: The normalized output of the Enigma get_list_materialization action.

actions.name: search_graphql
actions.description: Search Enigma entities through the official GraphQL search query, supporting direct lookups, structured filters, natural-language prompts, and asynchronous output generation.

prompt.description: A natural-language prompt used by Enigma semantic search.

id.description: The Enigma GraphQL entity ID to look up directly.

name.description: The business or entity name to search for.

id.description: The Enigma address identifier to search for directly.

street1.description: The first street-address line used to narrow the search.

street2.description: The second street-address line, such as suite or unit number.

city.description: The city used to narrow the search.

state.description: The state or region used to narrow the search.

postalCode.description: The postal code used to narrow the search.

address.description: An official Enigma GraphQL address input object.

id.description: The Enigma address identifier to search for directly.

street1.description: The first street-address line used to narrow the search.

street2.description: The second street-address line, such as suite or unit number.

city.description: The city used to narrow the search.

state.description: The state or region used to narrow the search.

postalCode.description: The postal code used to narrow the search.

items.description: An official Enigma GraphQL address input object.

addresses.description: Multiple address candidates used to narrow the search.

id.description: The Enigma address identifier to search for directly.

street1.description: The first street-address line used to narrow the search.

street2.description: The second street-address line, such as suite or unit number.

city.description: The city used to narrow the search.

state.description: The state or region used to narrow the search.

postalCode.description: The postal code used to narrow the search.

address.description: An official Enigma GraphQL address input object.

tin.description: The taxpayer identification number to search with.

tinType.description: The TIN type Enigma should use for the search.

tin.description: An official Enigma GraphQL TIN input object.

person.description: An official Enigma GraphQL person input object.

phoneNumber.description: A complete phone number used to narrow the search.

website.description: A website URL or domain used to narrow the search.

orderBy.description: The order-by expressions Enigma should apply.

limit.description: The maximum number of matches to return.

pageToken.description: The opaque Enigma page token used to continue pagination.

conditions.description: The official Enigma GraphQL conditions object.

tin.description: The taxpayer identification number to search with.

tinType.description: The TIN type Enigma should use for the search.

tin.description: An official Enigma GraphQL TIN input object.

matchThreshold.description: The minimum Enigma match confidence to keep.

entityType.description: The Enigma entity type to search or retrieve: brand, operating location, or legal entity.

engine.description: The Enigma search engine override to use for the query.

output.description: The official Enigma GraphQL output specification.

format.description: The export file format Enigma should generate.

enrichmentIdsS3Path.description: The Enigma-supported S3 parquet path containing internal_id values.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for the Enigma GraphQL search query. Provide at least one of prompt, id, name, website, or phoneNumber; entityType is required with id.

accepted.description: Whether Enigma accepted the request as an asynchronous background task.

results.description: The search results returned by Enigma.

backgroundTasks.description: Background tasks returned for asynchronous search jobs.

outputSchema.description: The normalized output of the Enigma GraphQL search action.

actions.name: search_lists
actions.description: Query user-created Enigma lists with optional name or ID filters and Relay-style pagination controls.

id.description: The Enigma list ID to filter by.

name.description: The list name to filter by.

orderBy.description: The order-by expressions Enigma should apply.

limit.description: The maximum number of matches to return.

pageToken.description: The opaque Enigma page token used to continue pagination.

conditions.description: The official Enigma GraphQL conditions object.

first.description: The number of items to return when paginating forward.

last.description: The number of items to return when paginating backward.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for querying Enigma user-created lists.

outputSchema.description: The normalized output of the Enigma search_lists action.

actions.name: verify_business_v2
actions.description: Verify a business with Enigma's KYB v2 API, returning a normalized risk summary and the raw verification payload.

package.description: The Enigma KYB package to run.

anyOf.description: A comma-separated list of KYB attributes.

names.description: Up to two business-name candidates to verify.

tin.description: A business TIN or EIN to verify.

tins.description: Up to one business TIN or EIN candidate to verify.

address.description: A KYB address object accepted by the Enigma v2 API.

items.description: A KYB address object accepted by the Enigma v2 API.

addresses.description: Up to two business-address candidates to verify.

person.description: A person object accepted by the Enigma v2 API.

items.description: A person object accepted by the Enigma v2 API.

personsToScreen.description: Up to four people to screen against watchlists.

websites.description: Up to one website candidate to verify.

topN.description: The maximum number of top matches Enigma should return.

matchConfidence.description: The minimum match confidence Enigma should keep.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for Enigma's KYB v2 business verification API.

outputSchema.description: The normalized output of the Enigma verify_business_v2 action.
